title: Iran War, U.S. Court’s tariff ruling delays India trade deal — but a bigger risk lies ahead
summary_full: A delay in signing a trade deal with the U.S. would be expensive for India, as it could be exposed to the risk of higher tariffs under the Section 301 probe.
summary_public: A delay in signing a trade deal with the U.S. would be expensive for India, as it could be exposed to the risk of higher tariffs under the Section 301 probe.
